Brilli Direction Gallery

Thirteen directions, side by side

Each tile is a live Canvas 2D animation showing one possible direction for Brilli, the visible AI presence inside Brilliance. Click any tile to view it large with Brilliance wordmark and direction notes. The chosen direction slots into the existing Brilli module spec without rebuilding the surrounding surfaces.
